name: @sawala/formulir-react
description: React components and headless hooks for embedding Sawala Formulir forms — drop-in for Next.js, Vite, Remix, and any React 18+ app.

scripts.verify-bundle: node -e "const fs=require('fs'),src=fs.readFileSync('src/form.tsx','utf8'),dist=fs.readFileSync('dist/index.js','utf8');for (const m of ['renderTurnstile','cf-turnstile-response','captchaSitekey']) { if (src.includes(m) && !dist.includes(m)) { console.error('publish guard: dist/ is missing marker present in src/:', m); process.exit(1); } }"
scripts.prepublishOnly: npm run build && npm run verify-bundle
